results.rendered_html: rathaka m. ein best. Theil des Hauses (mandirāvayavaviśeṣa) nach  ŚKDR.  in der Stelle: aṣṭakāṃśena garbhasya rathakānāṃ tu nirgamaḥ . paridherguṇabhāgena rathakāṃstatra kalpayet .. tattṛtīyena vā kuryādrathakānāṃ tu nirgamam . rāmatrayaṃ sthāpanīyaṃ rathakatritaye sadā ..  ŚRĪHARIBHAKTIVILĀSA 20 .
